hero.bio: I'm Ivan — I build websites for people who run their own thing. Your work deserves better than a Facebook page and a phone number.

danil.title: Danil Art
danil.description: A painter and tattoo artist in Czechia needed more than a gallery — he needed to sell. So the site ships with an admin panel: he adds works, sets prices, publishes. No developer required. Trilingual, built mobile-first.

erba.title: Erba Pura
erba.description: A self-initiated presentation page for a perfume. No cart, no price tags — the whole job is to make you feel the thing before you ever smell it.

about.stroke: Most sites just list what you do.
about.solid: I build the ones that make people want it.
points: Your services told like a story, not printed like a menu.
Loads fast. Works on a phone. Nothing broken.
Domain, hosting, deploy — I handle it. You just look at the result.

contact.heading: Got something worth showing?
contact.sub: Tell me what you do. I'll tell you how it should look.
